promotions.fact: Jury trial waiver and punitive damages waiver in Franchise Agreement Section 17.0
General release required at transfer/re-licensing (Section 16.8), with state overrides in MD, MN, NY, ND, RI, WA
Interest rate on overdue amounts is 18% per annum (FA Section 16.15), vs. 1.5%/month (Item 6 service charges)
Economic conditions not a defense to breach (FA Section 16.10)
Franchisor has independent access to all data in required systems with no contractual limitations (FA Section 10.4)
Confidentiality of negotiated terms (FA Section 16.18) — any modifications to standard terms are confidential
promotions.source_reader_report: Not in reader report - found in depth pass

promotions.fact: Open hotels list: Bentonville AR, Washington DC, NYC Chelsea, NYC Times Square, Philadelphia Rittenhouse Square
Graduate brand franchise contract intangible assets will be amortized over 15-year useful life
